import pytest
from source import knapsack

def test_knapsack_exact_weight_match():
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    result = knapsack(capacity, items)
    assert result == 10, f"Expected 10 for exact weight match, got {result}"
